border-orange-500","children":"A messy cable situation is ruining your workspace. Here's the systematic approach to taming every wire once and for all."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-hidden-productivity-cost-of-cable-chaos","children":"The Hidden Productivity Cost of Cable Chaos"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A tangled mess of cables under your desk does something subtle but real: it makes your workspace feel chaotic, and a chaotic environment erodes the mental clarity you're trying to maintain."}}],"$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a"]}],"$L1b","$L1c","$L1d"]}],"$L1e"]}]]}]
7:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
8:["$","$L1f",null,{"children":["$","$20",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@21"}]}]
9:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Cable management is one of the highest-ROI desk improvements you can make. The materials cost very little; the visual and psychological payoff is significant."}}]
a:["$","h2","3",{"id":"the-systematic-approach","children":"The Systematic Approach"}]
b:["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Don't attack cables one by one. Solve the problem systematically."}}]
c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Step 1: Audit everything</strong>. Unplug and label every cable. Figure out what each one is, where it starts, and where it ends. Identify anything you're not actually using."}}]
d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Step 2: Route before you secure</strong>. Plan the cable paths before you commit. Run cables along natural channels — down desk legs, along the back of a desk, under drawers."}}]
e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Step 3: Secure and conceal</strong>. Then and only then, start attaching cables."}}]
f:["$","h2","8",{"id":"the-essential-products","children":"The Essential Products"}]
10:["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Cable trays</strong>: A horizontal tray mounted under the desk catches your power strip and excess cable length. The Under Desk Cable Tray by VIVO is a popular and affordable option."}}]
11:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Cable clips</strong>: Adhesive or screw-mounted clips guide individual cables along edges and legs. VELCRO brand cable ties are endlessly reusable and easy to adjust."}}]
12:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Cable sleeves</strong>: For cable runs that can't be hidden (like between a monitor arm and the desk), a fabric sleeve bundles multiple cables into a single clean unit. Techflex is the professional choice."}}]
13:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Cable raceways</strong>: For cables running along walls, a surface-mounted raceway provides a clean channel. Paintable options blend into almost any wall color."}}]
14:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Short cables</strong>: One of the most overlooked solutions. Replace long cables (that end up coiled messily) with appropriately short cables. A 0.5m USB cable where a 2m one used to loop around makes an immediate difference."}}]
15:["$","h2","14",{"id":"the-wireless-strategy","children":"The Wireless Strategy"}]
16:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The most effective long-term approach is reducing the number of cables in the first place."}}]
17:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A USB-C hub or Thunderbolt dock lets you connect multiple peripherals through a single cable to your laptop. One cable in, everything else wireless or connected to the dock."}}]
18:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Wireless keyboard and mouse, wireless headphones, wireless charging pad for your phone — each one eliminated is a cable you'll never have to manage."}}]
19:["$","h2","18",{"id":"maintenance","children":"Maintenance"}]
1a:["$","p","19",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Cable management isn't a one-time project. Every time you add or change a device, take the time to route it properly. The five minutes you invest now saves thirty minutes of detangling later."}}]
1b:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Workspace","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Workspace"}],[["$","$L3","cable-management",{"href":"/blog/tag/cable-management","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","cable-management"]}],["$","$L3","organization",{"href":"/blog/tag/organization","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","organization"]}],["$","$L3","clean-desk",{"href":"/blog/tag/clean-desk","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","clean-desk"]}],["$","$L3","setup",{"href":"/blog/tag/setup","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","setup"]}]]]}]
1c:["$","$L22",null,{"title":"Cable Management: Turn Your Desk From Chaos to Clean","slug":"cable-management-guide"}]
1d:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L23",null,{}]}]

25:["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M7 7h10v10","key":"1tivn9"}],["path",{"d":"M7 17 17 7","key":"1vkiza"}]],"className":"lucide-arrow-up-right","size":14}]
